commit_scope: Move HTTP route candidate eligibility and full route-choice receipts into Form-native choice tissue and document the native HTTP choice-flow audit.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/http-parse.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/http-request.fk form-stdlib/http-render.fk form-stdlib/http-server.fk form-stdlib/tests/http-server-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/line-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bmf-core.fk form-stdlib/bmf-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bml.fk form-stdlib/bml-source.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/http-parse.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/http-request.fk form-stdlib/http-render.fk form-stdlib/http-server.fk form-stdlib/tests/http-server-band.fk

results.wellness: pass with remote telemetry timeout warnings; kernel-native API growth edge remains visible
results.kernel_http_binary_band: pass across Go/Rust/TypeScript binary artifacts with result 33555586
results.http_server_binary_band: pass across Go/Rust/TypeScript binary artifacts with result 63
results.rust_router_context_choice_receipt: pass; native handler context carries KernelHTTPRouteChoice, candidate table, and decision rows with blocked eligible=false selected=false and exact eligible=true selected=true
results.production_routes_name_check: pass; every name resolves in deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk
results.route_manifest_gate: pass; production-routes.fk and shadow-routes.fk are name-check clean with no production baseline exception
results.rust_route_manifest_regression: pass; source route manifest compiles to a recipe object program using kh-route-data-ref and generated HealthRoute_handle
results.production_routes_harness: pass; 109 promoted route checks are value-identical to local CPython oracle, fan-out /api/health still returns X-Form-Router=fanout-python, native p50 0.540ms/p99 0.690ms/min 0.486ms, CPython p50 10.233ms/p99 11.953ms/min 8.940ms, native p50 19.0x faster; 22 routes are promotion-ready

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No production deploy was performed for this local Form stdlib choice-flow change.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: HTTP route candidate eligibility is now computed and selected in Form, and each request can carry a full route-choice receipt so high-scoring over-budget routes are visible rejected branches rather than hidden skips.
test_flows: kernel-http-band proves an ineligible exact high-priority route loses to an eligible wildcard route, an all-ineligible set returns empty/score 0, and route-choice receipts carry candidates plus selected yes/no decision rows
http-server-band proves an exact route with a missing required header and zero pressure budget returns the route-miss response instead of invoking its handler
binary validation proves the same content-addressed artifact behavior across Go/Rust/TypeScript
Rust router context test proves the live native listener exports the same route-choice and route-decision tags to handlers
production route harness proves the content-addressed production route manifest boots from the repo root and keeps promoted route outputs identical to the CPython oracle
